requiredRuntime: arbitrary deployed EVM bytecode execution with persistent storage
CREATE and CREATE2 contract creation with standard receipt contractAddress
nested CALL, STATICCALL and revert-data propagation
EntryPoint handleOps validation, execution, logs, deposits and stakes
validation-compatible storage and opcode policy documented against ERC-7562
EIP-712, secp256k1 and P-256 Solidity fallback execution
deterministic gas accounting sufficient for Paymaster maxCost and postOp
bundlerAcceptance: eth_supportedEntryPoints includes the deployed v0.8 EntryPoint
eth_estimateUserOperationGas accepts the packed v0.8 UserOperation
eth_getUserOperationReceipt binds EntryPoint, sender, nonce, gas, success, logs and transaction receipt
